hero.title: Digital loyalty cards for your shop in 10 minutes
hero.subtitle: Issue branded loyalty cards on Apple Wallet and Google Wallet — no app, no developer, fully Arabic-first.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to your first loyal customer

design.title: Design your card
design.body: Upload your logo, pick a color, set stamp count and reward. Live preview of the wallet card.

share.title: Share a QR code
share.body: Get a printable QR for the counter, or a link for Instagram and WhatsApp.

redeem.title: Stamp & reward
redeem.body: Each visit, the cashier scans from the customer's wallet. The card auto-updates and notifies them.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Start with Starter — enough for 300 customers per month

footer.tagline: Simple digital loyalty cards for KSA merchants
